# WARP 대학교

## Warp 전문가 되기

Warp에서 더 스마트하게 작업하고 더 빠르게 빌드할 수 있도록 도와주는 튜토리얼입니다.

### 시작하기

Warp의 AI 기반 코딩 환경에서 시작하는 데 필요한 모든 것.

- [![Warp VS Claude Code](https://framerusercontent.com/images/FMLAv8IjgavtWUSe26m8FoP2mUY.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/warp-vs-claude-code)
- [![Using Project Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/JWxKEhmWQYmShZc5gZFQk9Wk.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/using-project-rules)
- [![Using Agent Profiles](https://framerusercontent.com/images/nQ37ClBuv7Vi1Bnni8PhWIhXzvA.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/using-agent-profiles)
- [![First look at Warp's Agent Runtime](https://framerusercontent.com/images/DTwwykqDCE7VTd8pB4jlQVaTa8.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/first-look-at-the-warp-agent-runtime)
- [![Make Warp's UI More Minimal](https://framerusercontent.com/images/r0rjoos2jOminP6CXtRNML2Cg9s.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/make-warp-s-ui-more-minimal)
- [![A Full Warp Overview](https://framerusercontent.com/images/NBjPGvM017MKaM8JQS4la73vP0.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/a-full-warp-overview)
- [![Customize Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/PDqLSktguFBaATObIbvcAzv0L9U.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/customize-warp)
- [![Start a Coding Task with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/JjTb4mNuyYpGA2MxqdUJSE9AUo.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/starting-a-coding-task-with-warp)
- [![Edit AI-Written Code Inline](https://framerusercontent.com/images/eF91CdeairFJL8aCdoftODNuk.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/edit-ai-written-code-inline)

[전체 9개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/getting-started/all)

### Warp 코드

Warp를 만든 사람들이 알려주는 기능과 사용 사례를 탐색해 보세요.

- [![Master Warp's Code Review Panel](https://framerusercontent.com/images/idQkkVujWQlWy6br2ycgQ0hmlM.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/warp-code/master-warp-s-code-review-panel)
- [![10 Coding Features You Should Know in Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/irUo7Ib6xBaE4krQNipoFhcEk0.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/warp-code/10-coding-features-you-should-know-in-warp)

[전체 2개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/warp-code/all)

### 개발자 워크플로우

더 빠르게 프로젝트를 계획하고, 빌드하고, 디버그하고, 배포하는 종단 간 워크플로우를 탐색해 보세요.

- [![Setting up Figma Remote MCP in Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/u0SJK69nGApP1iHCbZ6mF6J5Y.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/setting-up-figma-remote-mcp-in-warp)
- [![How to Setup Ollama using Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/VJlLAEmwscMOq1AIx5uygZLkx1I.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/how-to-setup-ollama-using-warp)
- [![Understand Codebases](https://framerusercontent.com/images/M1FLzOt7Qxmoi9YPyulF8aXKQso.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/use-warp-to-understand-codebases)
- [![Write Postgres Command with AI Prompts](https://framerusercontent.com/images/9SWs7ufH5kEduwvzegsouB3k9OI.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/write-postgres-command-with-ai-prompts-with-warp)
- [![Analyze Cloud Run Logs](https://framerusercontent.com/images/wQJdqy9p1k6J8ablHTdglCfRQ.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/analyze-cloud-run-logs-with-warp)
- [![Making a UI Change](https://framerusercontent.com/images/6UPwBH6wH93JJEN1exfiIKtqrqc.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/making-a-ui-change-with-warp)
- [![Run and Review Code with Multiple Agents](https://framerusercontent.com/images/c0l4VQpKZOZnaM6BXpUPYdH5l8.jpg?width=1600&height=900)](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/run-and-review-code-with-multiple-agents-with-warp)

[전체 7개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/developer-workflows/all)

### MCP 사용하기

Warp를 강력한 MCP 통합에 연결하여 워크플로우를 확장하는 방법을 배워보세요.

- [![Connecting Warp to Linear via MCP](https://framerusercontent.com/images/9INk6p4USKdXYMeIbv2WzP5eHA0.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/connecting-warp-to-linear-via-mcp)
- [![Using Puppeteer MCP Server](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Xc45oiUPfD41M7lOfP4cG91Gjo.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/using-puppeteer-mcp-server)
- [![Using Context7 MCP Server](https://framerusercontent.com/images/EZnUNR5X1Yg6KmgHUZCJUnyXnU.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/using-context7-mcp-server)
- [![Using Sentry MCP Server](https://framerusercontent.com/images/GGIJ3a1PoNEZrWQPuEZ3TlyciaY.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/using-sentry-mcp-server)
- [![Using Figma MCP Server](https://framerusercontent.com/images/KzuakZaEHaNZrRHHfItWaJeJM.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/using-the-figma-mcp-server-to-code-designs)
- [![Using Github MCP Server](https://framerusercontent.com/images/stnHjn4t8Gr2z3u3kX6q7wzUp5I.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/using-github-mcp-server)

[전체 6개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/mcp/all)

### 규칙

AI 에이전트를 안내하고, 모범 사례를 강제하며, 코드를 안전하게 유지하기 위한 사용자 정의 규칙 설정하기.

- [![Link Your Monorepos with Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/c5iAzqUQC98IUltYlI41ZmGwW0.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/link-your-monorepos-with-rules)
- [![Set Coding Best Practices with Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/7ac8Of9PNdUt6ib41vxBTd8X7ow.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/set-coding-best-practices-with-rules)
- [![Set Tech Stack Preferences with Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/8OKCY1Fmh04X6ZQViZ11WJNVtw.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/set-tech-stack-preferences-with-rules)
- [![Set Coding Preferences with Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/oZwr8EH2OIpLER9tBDsqqRyXwI.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/set-coding-preferences-with-rules)
- [![Prevent Secrets from Leaking with Rules](https://framerusercontent.com/images/vx6WnqpqDNd0ldGmTYSpLCWuBDs.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/prevent-secrets-from-leaking-with-rules)

[전체 5개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/rules/all)

### 프롬프트

더 빠르고, 더 정확하며, 더 유용한 AI 응답을 얻기 위한 프롬프트 기술을 마스터하세요.

- [![Better Prompts for Debugging Your App](https://framerusercontent.com/images/sxVfl4A2uzjD8X5urVQ8s7h6wU.png)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/better-prompts-for-debugging-your-app)
- [![Create Priority Matrix for Database Optimization](https://framerusercontent.com/images/baA0x0jNuhomVCQtE5qALFXgTc0.png)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/create-priority-matrix-for-database-optimization)
- [![Reviewing PRs Like A Senior Dev](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Hsk8RIvKqi6RyCZajU1L3bjhmzA.png)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/reviewing-prs-like-a-senior-dev)
- [![How to Actually Code UI That Matches Your Mockup](https://framerusercontent.com/images/zkRCTzft5IXncg3qZFIP4O4GRA.png)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/how-to-actually-code-ui-that-matches-your-mockup)
- [![Create a Production Ready Docker Setup](https://framerusercontent.com/images/fgjmA94wHFAkmUlqHrYLSno2LUk.png)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/create-a-production-ready-docker-setup)
- [![Trigger Reusable Actions with Saved Prompts](https://framerusercontent.com/images/aWybtQ7EfZhxIrw4WgQtXRAOUmQ.jpg)](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/trigger-reusable-actions-with-saved-prompts)

[전체 6개 동영상 보기](https://www.warp.dev/university/prompts/all)

### Warp가 Warp를 사용하는 방법

Warp를 만든 사람들이 알려주는 기능과 사용 사례를 탐색하세요.

- [![Understanding your Codebase with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Ms9XMpaWjqkykArog4FnRpo4.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/understanding-your-codebase-with-warp)
- [![Using images as context with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/fHkzho8OfV49L7NFHz5UdN3q06o.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/using-images-as-context-with-warp)
- [![Using multiple agents at once with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/tBvADGcW13h1q9dNkkrWr2BoP6U.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/using-multiple-agents-at-once-with-warp)
- [![Using MCP servers with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/lifk3rhuBdmTGev834EFNvXDAY.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/using-mcp-servers-with-warp)
- [![Building Warp's input with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/0YiRTPbhgMfUgwY8lBdLpyM8hug.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/building-warp-s-input-with-warp)
- [![Creating rules for Agents with Warp](https://framerusercontent.com/images/WmA8RBZiWujJhRYrjjhUKNRpOc.jpg?width=1280&height=720)](https://www.warp.dev/university/how-warp-uses-warp/creating-rules-for-agents-with-warp)
